ideation: This animation sequence portrays a robot playfully mimicking the swaying motion of a palm tree in a gentle breeze. The arms will move rhythmically, suggesting a relaxed and carefree atmosphere.  The sequence focuses on a gentle side-to-side sway, not a dramatic back and forth.  The left arm will mirror the right, but with slight variations to avoid perfect symmetry.  I'll use the available joints to create a natural, almost organic-feeling movement that evokes the image of a palm tree swaying in the wind. Let's create some natural-looking movement!

frames.beat: arms sway gently to the sides, like a palm
the sway deepens, a gentle breeze rustles leaves
arms return to center, a calm tropical moment
